import React from 'react'; import { X, Video, Play, Eye, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'; const CourseModal = ({ course, onClose, onVideoPlay, onDelete }) => { if (!course) return null; return (
FREE ACCESS - Instructor View

{course.title}

₹{course.price.toLocaleString()}

{course.desc}

{((course.videos && course.videos.length > 0) || course.videoUrl) && (

{course.videos && course.videos.length > 0 ? ( course.videos.map((video, index) => (

Video {index + 1}

{video}

)) ) : course.videoUrl ? (

Course Video

{course.videoUrl}

) : null}
)}
Instructor
{course.instructor}
Duration
{course.time}
Level
{course.level}
Students
{course.enrolled.toLocaleString()}

Course Content (Instructor Access)

1. Introduction to {course.title} ✓ Available
2. Core Concepts and Fundamentals ✓ Available
3. Practical Examples and Projects ✓ Available
4. Advanced Topics and Best Practices ✓ Available
); }; export default CourseModal;
